top_5_fixes: Add path-based workflow triggers so strategy-governance-fast runs only when strategy artifacts or tests change.
Publish CI timing telemetry to quantify fast-job feedback improvements over full pipeline.
Archive ci-fast-validation output as workflow artifact for easier triage on failures.
Add branch protection recommendation requiring strategy-governance-fast for governance-sensitive PRs.
Consider splitting fast-governance checks into a reusable composite action for maintainability.
